en.name: Level 37 — Sublimity
en.shortDescription: A vast submerged complex of white ceramic rooms flooded with relaxing salt water, its surreal architecture serving no clear purpose.
en.atmosphere: Serene yet unsettling calm over crystalline pools under perfect light; strange geometry and altered acoustics undercut the peace.
en.tips: Appears entirely entity-free and restful. Avoid the deep pits and dark tunnels; the Epsom-salt water relaxes but long immersion is untested.
